base_url.description: Full Workable SPI v3 base URL, for example https://example.workable.com/spi/v3.

api_key.description: Workable API access token sent as a Bearer token.

start_date.description: Optional timestamp sent as created_after on legacy-compatible list streams.

candidate_id.description: Candidate id for candidate detail and sub-resource streams.

job_shortcode.description: Job shortcode for job detail and sub-resource streams.

employee_id.description: Employee id for employee detail, documents, and employee-scoped filters.

event_id.description: Event id for event detail stream.

offer_id.description: Offer id for offer detail stream.

requisition_code.description: Requisition code for requisition detail stream.

timeoff_from_date.description: Lower date bound for timeoff_requests, whose API requires from_date.
